Custom Development · Mivan Global Ltd

SOFTWARE BUILT AROUNDHOW YOUR BUSINESS WORKS.

Off-the-shelf software rarely fits perfectly. We design and build custom B2B portals, inventory systems, warranty platforms, and business dashboards that match your actual operational workflow.

Discuss Your ProjectView Case Studies
Built for Your Business
Not a Generic Template
01.

DISCOVERY & SCOPING

We map your current workflow, identify where things break down, and define exactly what needs to be built to solve the actual problem.

02.

DESIGN & BUILD

We build your system in stages with regular check-ins so you can see progress, give feedback, and adjust as needed before full delivery.

03.

INTEGRATION & LAUNCH

We connect your new system to the tools you already use — whether that is accounting software, e-commerce platforms, or existing databases.

04.

SUPPORT & UPDATES

We stay involved after launch to fix issues, add features, and make sure the system keeps working as your business grows and changes.

What We Build

SOFTWARE WE BUILD.

B2B

B2B Ordering Portals

Self-service portals that allow your wholesale customers to view live stock, place orders, and download invoices without contacting your team.

INVENTORY

Inventory Systems

Custom stock management tools that track products, movements, and locations in a way that fits your actual warehouse or storage setup.

WARRANTY

Warranty & Repair Platforms

Systems for managing warranty claims, repair requests, and returns — with status tracking and customer communication built in.

REPORTING

Business Dashboards

Reporting dashboards that pull data from your existing tools and present it clearly — stock, orders, revenue, and key metrics in one view.

INTEGRATION

System Integrations

Connections between tools that do not talk to each other — linking your website, accounting software, marketplace, or CRM to reduce manual data entry.

TOOLS

Staff & Internal Tools

Simple apps and tools built for your team — whether for scanning stock, updating job status, or managing tasks in the field.

How We Approach It

PRINCIPLES WE BUILDEVERY SYSTEM AROUND.

Every system we build starts with understanding your workflow first — not proposing a solution before we understand the problem.

🎯

Built Around Your Workflow

We do not apply a generic template. We design the system around how your business actually operates, not around what is easiest to build.

Custom logic for your processNo unnecessary featuresFits how your team works
🔗

Connected to Your Tools

We build systems that work alongside the tools you already use — connecting data rather than replacing everything at once.

Accounting & invoicing integrationE-commerce platform connectionAPI-based data sync
📊

Clear Reporting

Every system we build includes reporting so you can see what is happening — without needing to export data into spreadsheets manually.

Real-time dashboardsRole-based accessExportable reports
🛠️

Ongoing Support

We stay involved after launch. If something needs fixing or a new feature is needed as your business grows, we are available to help.

Post-launch maintenanceFeature updatesSystem monitoring
Full IP Ownership
Your system, your asset

HAVE A WORKFLOW PROBLEM WE CAN SOLVE?

Tell us what is not working in your current process. We will design a system that fixes it — without unnecessary complexity.
